creator: tommyhp2@gmail.com
text:
Per CVE: CVE-2020-2574

http://vuxml.freebsd.org/freebsd/cb0183bb-45f6-11ea-a1c7-b499baebfeaf.html

Please update to current versions.

diff -ur mariadb-connector-c/Makefile mariadb-connector-c_tmp/Makefile
--- mariadb-connector-c/Makefile        2020-03-22 13:04:28.730049000 -0700
+++ mariadb-connector-c_tmp/Makefile    2020-03-22 13:04:45.182506000 -0700
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD: head/databases/mariadb-connector-c/Makefile 514130 2019-10-09 10:34:56Z bapt $

 PORTNAME=      mariadb-connector-c
-PORTVERSION=   3.0.9
+PORTVERSION=   3.1.7
 PORTREVISION=  1
 CATEGORIES=    databases
 MASTER_SITES=  http://ftp.osuosl.org/pub/${SITESDIR}/ \
diff -ur mariadb-connector-c/distinfo mariadb-connector-c_tmp/distinfo
--- mariadb-connector-c/distinfo        2020-03-22 12:13:20.128878000 -0700
+++ mariadb-connector-c_tmp/distinfo    2020-03-22 12:06:00.806364000 -0700
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-TIMESTAMP = 1584904400
-SHA256 (mariadb-connector-c-3.0.9-src.tar.gz) = 7277c0caba6f50b1d07e1d682baf0b962a63e2e6af9e00e09b8dcf36a7858641
-SIZE (mariadb-connector-c-3.0.9-src.tar.gz) = 668142
+TIMESTAMP = 1584833289
+SHA256 (mariadb-connector-c-3.1.7-src.tar.gz) = 64f7bc8f5df3200ba6e3080f68ee4942382a33e8371baea8ca4b9242746df59a
+SIZE (mariadb-connector-c-3.1.7-src.tar.gz) = 742923
root@d-build-fbsd12:/usr/ports/databases # diff -ur mariadb-connector-odbc{,_tmp}
diff -ur mariadb-connector-odbc/Makefile mariadb-connector-odbc_tmp/Makefile
--- mariadb-connector-odbc/Makefile     2020-03-21 17:59:55.879823000 -0700
+++ mariadb-connector-odbc_tmp/Makefile 2020-03-22 13:05:30.148807000 -0700
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD: head/databases/mariadb-connector-odbc/Makefile 514130 2019-10-09 10:34:56Z bapt $

 PORTNAME=      mariadb
-DISTVERSION=   3.0.9
+DISTVERSION=   3.1.6
 CATEGORIES=    databases
 MASTER_SITES=  http://ftp.osuosl.org/pub/${SITESDIR}/ \
                http://mirrors.supportex.net/${SITESDIR}/ \
diff -ur mariadb-connector-odbc/distinfo mariadb-connector-odbc_tmp/distinfo
--- mariadb-connector-odbc/distinfo     2020-03-21 18:00:24.447487000 -0700
+++ mariadb-connector-odbc_tmp/distinfo 2020-03-22 13:07:33.662961000 -0700
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-TIMESTAMP = 1584838824
-SHA256 (mariadb-connector-odbc-3.0.9-ga-src.tar.gz) = 9b46e663ae0c3ca6b4e48226580001144542cc1be9bd99f28880aa01ff339437
-SIZE (mariadb-connector-odbc-3.0.9-ga-src.tar.gz) = 197240
+TIMESTAMP = 1584907653
+SHA256 (mariadb-connector-odbc-3.1.6-ga-src.tar.gz) = fbad8430cc728609f4c6b0aac5acb27d0b0a1315be45fb697f9e16919b3cbb71
+SIZE (mariadb-connector-odbc-3.1.6-ga-src.tar.gz) = 536871
root@d-build-fbsd12:/usr/ports/databases #
